title: Craftable Bell Recipe
body:
# Craftable Bell Recipe


**Ding Without the Drama Let’s be honest** 

Bells are cool, but getting one? You either steal it from a village or hope for a lucky trade. This datapack skips the awkward looting and lets you craft your own. Ding-ding, done.

Note: “Bell Recipe” is a custom recipe added by the datapack.If your are interested in more Datapacks Check out the links at the end of the description.

**🔔 Why It’s Better**

Because every base deserves a bell. Whether you're setting up a town square, building a spooky mansion, or just want to annoy your friends with constant ringing, this pack makes it easy.

**📦 How To U**se:

1. Download the .zip
 
2. Drop it into your world’s datapacks/ folder
 
3. Type /reload in-game
 
4. Craft your Bell and ring it like you mean it
 ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
